annual_rate.notes: Prejudgment interest under Contract/liquidated: IC 24-4.6-1-103 — 8% (simple interest). This is PREjudgment interest (accruing before entry of judgment) and is separate from Indiana’s post-judgment rate; availability is limited by claim type (see the page). Verify against the statute text. Not legal advice.
